lsp.justification: Fully matches the GT: it found all 26 os_malloc() call sites across the same 8 src/eap_common files, concluded no leaks, and correctly identified the 3 returned-buffer ownership transfers plus the 7 ikev2_derive_sk_keys struct-field ownership transfers freed via ikev2_free_keys() on failure. The extra LSP/build-configuration caveat is not central to the benchmark question, but it does not change the correct coverage or verdict.
